I have been using Groww for quite some time, and my overall experience has been excellent. The app offers a clean, user-friendly interface with smooth navigation and fast order execution. It provides all the essential features for investing and trading, including stocks, mutual funds, and F&O trading, in one place. Portfolio tracking is simple, and the platform is easy to use for both beginners and experienced traders.

Very disappointed with Groww. I faced a serious app glitch while trading, and because of this issue I suffered a significant loss. The app was not working properly at a critical moment, which affected my ability to manage my position. For a trading platform, reliability and execution are very important. I hope the team improves stability and takes such issues seriously.

I have repeatedly raised concerns regarding a discrepancy in my mutual fund investment, but I do not feel that my issue is being properly investigated. My invested amount was showing approximately ₹1,05,000, and later it dropped to around ₹85,000 without any redemption or transaction initiated by me. The app is otherwise ok and stable. While redeeming the money from MFs the app always has a default option to credit the amount to groww balance instead of bank account. A user has to manually switch to bank account each time if they dont want it to be credited to wallet. Please keep the default option as bank account and not wallet. In emergencies this manual switch is easily skipped and  then  it takes 1 additional day to transfer money to bank account from wallet which is just inconvenient. Instead the wallet should be optional and default should be bank account for crediting the redeemed balance.
